steps.title: Match future success
steps.content: The claim says the speaker predicts future success. The best quotation must clearly point to a future victorious outcome, not just a sound, command, or statement of duty.

steps.title: Reject weaker quotations
steps.content: Choice A asks whether the sound of feet can be heard. Choice B tells people to get in line. Choice C says a duty has been answered, but it does not predict future success. The answer is D.
